mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice(title, content, secret, top, type, writer, writer_login_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{secret}, #{top}, #{type}, #{writer}, #{writer_login_id})
mapper.select: select * from notice order by regdate desc limit 1
SELECT * FROM notice ORDER BY CASE WHEN type = 'G' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment(content, writer, writer_login_id, notice_id) VALUES (#{content}, #{writer}, #{writer_login_id}, #{notice_id})
mapper.select: select * from comment order by regdate desc limit 1
select * from comment where notice_id = #{id} ORDER BY id
